title: solanum nigrum subsp. chlorocarpum
intro: Solanum nigrum subsp. chlorocarpum, also known as the black nightshade or dark-fruited nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum nigrum plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum subsp. chlorocarpum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
